---
title: "Workshop General Timings Schedule"
format: html
date-modified: last-modified
---

```{=html}
<style>
.copy-table-btn {
  display: inline-block;
  margin: 0.4em 0 0.3em 0;
  padding: 3px 10px;
  font-size: 0.8em;
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #f6f6f6;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #333;
}
.copy-table-btn:hover { background: #eaeaea; }
.copy-table-btn.copied { background: #d6f5d6; border-color: #7cc47c; }
</style>
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  document.querySelectorAll("table").forEach(function (table) {
    var btn = document.createElement("button");
    btn.className = "copy-table-btn";
    btn.type = "button";
    btn.textContent = "Copy table";
    table.parentNode.insertBefore(btn, table);

    btn.addEventListener("click", function () {
      var rows = table.querySelectorAll("tr");
      var lines = [];
      rows.forEach(function (row) {
        var cells = row.querySelectorAll("th,td");
        var vals = Array.from(cells).map(function (c) {
          return c.textContent.trim();
        });
        lines.push(vals.join("\t"));
      });
      var tsv = lines.join("\n");

      navigator.clipboard.writeText(tsv).then(function () {
        btn.textContent = "Copied!";
        btn.classList.add("copied");
        setTimeout(function () {
          btn.textContent = "Copy table";
          btn.classList.remove("copied");
        }, 1500);
      });
    });
  });
});
</script>
```


# **Work in progress....**

## Introduction to R

::: {.panel-tabset}

### One day (10am–4pm)

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 10–10:25 |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 10:25–10:35 |
| Intro to R/Rstudio | 40 mins | 10:35–11:15 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:15–11:25 |
| R basics | 1.5 hour | 11:25–12:30 |
| LUNCH | 45 mins | 12:30–1:15 |
| R basics | | 1:15–1:40 |
| Intro to dataset | 5 mins | 1:40–1:45 |
| R basics contd - factors and df | 1 hour | 1:45–2:45 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 2:45–2:55 |
| Data viz w ggplot2 | 20 mins | 2:55–3:15 |
| Conclusions/Getting help with R | ~30 mins | 3:15–END |
| Producing Reports with knitr | | |

### Two day (9:30am–12:30pm)

**Day 1**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 9:30–9:55 |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 9:55–10:05 |
| Intro to R/Rstudio | 30 mins | 10:05–10:35 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:35–10:45 |
| R basics | 1.5 hrs | 10:45–11:40 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:40–11:50 |
| R basics | ... | 11:50–12:25 |

**Day 2**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Intro to dataset | 5 mins | 9:30–9:35 |
| R basics contd - dataframes and manipulation | 1 hr | 9:35–10:35 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:35–10:45 |
| Data viz w ggplot2 | 30 mins | 10:45–11:15 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:15–11:25 |
| Conclusion: Getting help with R | 30 mins | 11:25–11:55 |

:::

## Visualisation with ggplot2

Single-day workshop, 10am–4pm.

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 10:00–10:25 am |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 10:25–10:35 am |
| Visualisation with ggplot2 | 30 mins | 10:35–11:05 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:05–11:15 am |
| Exploratory analysis | 1 hour | 11:15–12:15 am |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:15–1:05 pm |
| Exemplar vis | 40 mins | 1:05–1:45 pm |
| Building better plots | 1.5 hour | 1:45–2:20 pm |
| BREAK | 15 mins | 2:20–2:35 pm |
| Building better plots | ... | 2:35–3:30 pm |
| Close environment | | END OF DAY |

## RNA-seq

Two-day workshop.

**Day 1**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 9–9:25 |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 9:25–9:35 |
| Background | 10 mins | 9:35–9:45 |
| Sequence quality | 55 mins | 9:45–10:10 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10–10:10 |
| Sequence quality | | 10:10–10:40 |
| Quantifying gene expn | 1 hour | 10:40–11:10 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:10–11:20 |
| Quantifying gene expn | | 11:20–11:50 |
| Exploratory analysis | 1 hour | 11:50–12:20 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 12:20–12:30 |
| Exploratory analysis | | 12:30–END |

**Day 2**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Identify DE genes | | |
| t-tests and Pvalues | 25 mins | 9–9:25 |
| Identify DE w limma | 50 mins | 9:25–10:00 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10–10:10 |
| Identify DE w limma | | 10:10–10:25 |
| Identify DE w DEseq2 | 30 mins | 10:25–10:55 |
| BREAK | 15 mins | 10:55–11:10 |
| Functional analysis | 50 mins | 11:10–12:00 |
| OPTIONAL BREAK | 5–10 mins | |
| General discussion | ~30 mins | 12:00–END |

## Reproducibility with Git and Quarto

Two-day workshop.

**Day 1 – Git** (9:30am–2:30pm)

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 9:30–9:55 am |
| Automated version control | 5 mins | 9:55–10:00 am |
| Setting up Git | 10 mins | 10:00–10:10 am |
| Create a repository | 10 mins | 10:10–10:20 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:20–10:30 am |
| Tracking, adding, committing, restoring changes | 50 mins | 10:30–11:20 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:20–11:30 am |
| Pushing local changes to github | 40 mins | 11:30–12:10 pm |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:10–1:00 pm |
| Branches, pulling and merging | 40 mins | 1:00–1:40 pm |
| Collaborating and organising your workflow | 20 mins | 1:40–2:00 pm |

**Day 2 – Quarto** (9:30am–2:30pm)

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Introduction to Quarto | 10 mins | 9:30–9:40 am |
| Getting started | 45 mins | 9:40–10:25 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:25–10:35 am |
| Code in qmd files | 45 mins | 10:35–11:20 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:20–11:30 am |
| Projects: books and websites | 30 mins | 11:30–12:00 pm |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:00–12:50 pm |
| Building our own research portfolio | 50 mins | 12:50–1:40 pm |
| Optional extra time | | 1:40–2:30 pm |

## Introduction to Shell for Bioinformatics

::: {.panel-tabset}

### One day

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 10:00–10:25 am |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 10:25–10:35 am |
| Overview | 5 mins | 10:35–10:40 am |
| First steps - say goodbye to mouse | 30 mins | 10:40–11:10 am |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:10–11:20 am |
| Navigating files and dirs | 40 mins | 11:20–12:00 |
| Working with files and dirs | 55 mins | 12:00–12:20 |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:20–1:10 pm |
| Working with files and dirs | ... | 1:10–1:45 |
| Redirection | 50 mins | 1:45–2:20 pm |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 2:20–2:30 pm |
| Redirection | ... | 2:30–2:45 pm |
| Writing with scripts and working with data | 45 mins | 2:45–3:30 pm |
| Project organisation | ~5 mins | 3:30–3:35 pm |

### Two day (9:30am–12:30pm)

**Day 1**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 09:30–09:55 |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 09:55–10:05 |
| Overview | 5 mins | 10:05–10:10 |
| First steps - say goodbye to mouse | 30 mins | 10:10–10:40 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:40–10:50 |
| Navigating files and dirs | 40 mins | 10:50–11:30 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:30–11:40 |
| Working with files and dirs | 50 mins | 11:40–12:30 |

**Day 2**

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Working with files and dirs | 10 mins | 09:30–09:40 |
| Redirection | 50 mins | 09:40–10:30 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 10:30–10:40 |
| Writing with scripts and working with data | 45 mins | 10:40–11:25 |
| Project organisation | 10 mins | 11:25–11:35 |

:::

## Introduction to Bash Scripting and HPC Scheduler

Single-day workshop only, 10am–4pm.

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 10:00–10:25 am |
| Environment log in | 10 mins | 10:25–10:35 am |
| Background | 5 mins | 10:35–10:40 |
| Variant calling workflow | 1 hour | 10:40–11:10 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:10–11:20 |
| Variant calling workflow | ... | 11:20–11:50 |
| Automating a variant calling workflow | 30 mins | 11:50–12:20 |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:20–13:10 |
| RNA-Seq Mapping and Count Data Workflow | 1.5 hour | 13:10–14:40 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 14:40–14:50 |
| Introduction to HPC | 10 mins | 14:50–15:00 |
| Working with job scheduler | 1 hour | 15:00–16:00 |

## Intermediate R

Two-day workshop only.

**Day 1**

| Episode | Instructor | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | Chloe | 25 mins | 9–9:25 |
| Environment log in | Matt | 10 mins | 9:25–9:35 |
| Introduction to data | Chloe | 10 mins | 9:20–9:30 |
| String manipulation | Chloe | 1 hour | 9:30–10:30 |
| BREAK | | 15 mins | 10:30–10:45 |
| Relational data | Murray | 40 mins | 10:45–11:25 |
| Functions and conditional statements | | | |
| part1 Anatomy of functions | Murray | 40 mins | 11:25–11:45 |
| BREAK | | 15 mins | 11:45–12:00 |
| Functions and conditional statements | | | |
| part1 Anatomy of functions | Murray | ... | 12:00–12:20 |
| part2 alpha diversity | Matt | 40 mins | 12:20–1pm |

**Day 2**

| Episode | Instructor | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|---|
| part3 improve function design | | 30 mins | 9–9:30 |
| Iterations | | | |
| part1 for loops | | 50 mins | 9:30–10:40 |
| BREAK | | 15 mins | 10:40–10:55 |
| part2 Pairwise correlation | | 40 mins | 10:55–11:35 |
| part3 rules to iterate by | | 20 mins | 11:35–11:55 |
| BREAK | | 15 mins | 11:55–12:10 |
| Data structures | | 40 mins | 12:10–12:50 |

## Intermediate Shell

::: {.callout-warning}
Source spreadsheet flags this schedule as "needs updating — times are incorrect." Treat the approx times below as unreliable until revised.
:::

Single-day workshop, Day 1 only shown.

| Episode | Duration | Approx time |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome and opening | 25 mins | 10–10:25 |
| Environment log in | 5 mins | 10:25–10:30 |
| 1. Download and verify data | 10 mins | 10:30–10:40 |
| 2. Streams, redirection, pipe | 35 mins | 10:35–11:10 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 11:10–11:20 |
| 3. Inspecting + manipulating part1 | 1hr 10 | 11:20–12:30 |
| LUNCH | 50 mins | 12:30–13:20 |
| 4. Inspecting + manipulating part2 | 1 hour | 13:20–14:20 |
| BREAK | 10 mins | 14:20–14:30 |
| 4. Inspecting + manipulating part3 | 45 mins | 14:30–15:15 |
| Puzzles | 45 mins | 15:15–16:00 |
